patterns: How to get admission in this college
What is the admission process for BTech
responses: Admissions for B.Tech programs are currently open. You can check complete details, eligibility criteria, and application process here: https://www.heritageit.edu/PDF/BTech_2025_2026.pdf
For admission-related queries, please refer to the official brochure: https://www.heritageit.edu/PDF/BTech_2025_2026.pdf or contact the college at 9830201234 / (033) 6627 0623.
The college offers a variety of B.Tech programs including Computer Science (CSE), Electronics & Communication (ECE), Electrical Engineering (EE), Mechanical Engineering (ME), and more.
You can explore all available undergraduate programs and departments here: https://www.heritageit.edu/UndergraduateProgms.aspx
You can contact the college through the official website: https://www.heritageit.edu/ or call the helpdesk at 9830201234 / (033) 6627 0623.
For further assistance, please reach out via phone at 9830201234 or visit the official website contact section.

responses: You can view the detailed B.Tech fee structure here for all branches : https://www.heritageit.edu/PDF/BTech_2025_2026.pdf
For lateral entry admissions, please refer to the fee details here: https://www.heritageit.edu/PDF/BriefInformationBTech2025_Lateral.pdf
The class routine and timetable for all departments are available on the official website. You can check it here: https://www.heritageit.edu/routines.aspx
Please visit the official routine page to view your class schedule: https://www.heritageit.edu/routines.aspx

patterns: How to login to students portal
How can I login to portal
responses: You can access the student portal using the following link: https://theheritage.ac.in/LoginStudent.aspx
Click here to log in to the student dashboard: https://theheritage.ac.in/LoginStudent.aspx
You can check the latest notices and announcements on the official notice board here: https://www.heritageit.edu/Notice.aspx
All recent updates and notices are available here: https://www.heritageit.edu/Notice.aspx
The examination timetable is published on the official website. You can access it here: https://www.heritageit.edu/NoticePDF/62389375Not270426.pdf
Please refer to the official exam schedule using this link: https://www.heritageit.edu/NoticePDF/62389375Not270426.pdf

patterns: What is the anti ragging policy
Tell me about anti ragging rules
What are the rules against ragging
What happens if someone does ragging
What should I do if ragging happens
Does college have anti ragging policy
How safe is college from ragging
responses: The college strictly follows anti-ragging regulations as per government norms. Ragging is strictly prohibited, and strict disciplinary action is taken against offenders.
You can review the official anti-ragging policy here: https://www.heritageit.edu/PDF/AntiRaggingWarning.pdf
